PaginatedTableService.columns: id, slug, title, description, created_at, updated_at, username, profile_slug, bio, image, favorites_count, favorited, name
PaginatedTableService.sql: select a.id as id, a.slug as slug, a.title as title, a.description as description, cast(a.created_at as varchar) as created_at, cast(a.updated_at as varchar) as updated_at, u.name as username, u.slug as profile_slug, u.bio as bio, 'https://www.gravatar.com/avatar/' || md5(lower(trim(u.email))) || '?d=identicon&s=80' as image, (select count(*) from favorites f where f.article_id = a.id) as favorites_count, exists( select 1 from favorites f where f.article_id = a.id and f.user_id = :currentUserId ) as favorited, article_tag.name as name from articles a join users u on u.id = a.author_id join follows following on following.followed_id = a.author_id and following.follower_id = :currentUserId left join article_tags article_tag_link on article_tag_link.article_id = a.id left join tags article_tag on article_tag.id = article_tag_link.tag_id where coalesce(cast(:tag as varchar), '') = '' or exists( select 1 from article_tags selected_at join tags selected_tag on selected_tag.id = selected_at.tag_id where selected_at.article_id = a.id and selected_tag.name = :tag )
